2026-04-21T05:49:33.9135382Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-21T05:49:33.9136424Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
